mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_ID AS userId, USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, USER_NAME AS userName, USER_TYPE AS userType, CASE WHEN USER_TYPE = 1 THEN '일반' WHEN USER_TYPE = 2 THEN '기업' ELSE '기타' END AS userTypeText FROM TBL_USER
USER_STATUS = 1
AND USER_NO = #{keyword}
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND USER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( (#{keyword} = '일반' AND USER_TYPE = 1) OR (#{keyword} = '기업' AND USER_TYPE = 2) )
AND USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USER_NO DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_ID AS userId, USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, USER_NAME AS userName, USER_TYPE AS userType, CASE WHEN USER_TYPE = 1 THEN '일반' WHEN USER_TYPE = 2 THEN '기업' ELSE '기타' END AS userTypeText FROM TBL_USER ORDER BY USER_NO DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(USER_NO) FROM TBL_USER
USER_STATUS = 1
AND USER_NO = #{keyword}
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND USER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( (#{keyword} = '일반' AND USER_TYPE = 1) OR (#{keyword} = '기업' AND USER_TYPE = 2) )

SELECT U.USER_NO AS userNo, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, U.USER_ADDRESS AS userAddress, U.USER_ADDRESS_DETAIL AS userAddressDetail, NVL(C.TOTAL_AMOUNT, 0) AS totalAmount FROM TBL_USER U LEFT JOIN TBL_CURRENCY C ON U.USER_NO = C.USER_NO WHERE U.USER_NO = #{value}
SELECT LOG_NO AS logNo, USER_NO AS userNo, CHANGE_AMOUNT AS changeAmount, LOG_REASON AS logReason, LOG_DATE AS logDate FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{value} ORDER BY LOG_DATE DESC, LOG_NO DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_NICKNAME = #{userNickname}
